# nxt-sortablejs documentation

> Angular sortablejs bindings.

> Generated by compodoc 2.0.0 at 2026-07-10T19:50:11.565Z, llm-md export.

## Directives

### SortablejsDirective

File: `src/lib/sortablejs.directive.ts`
Selector: `[nxtSortablejs]`

Inputs:
- `cloneFunction: CloneFunction<T>` — A function invoked when cloning items from template dataset into target dataset
- `config: Options` — Sortablejs configuration
- `nxtSortablejs: SortableData<T> = undefined` — Input data, can be Array or FormArray
- `sortablejsContainer: string` — CSS selector for the sortable container Mostly required when used with custom components which wrap items in multiple containers. In that case, this should be the selector for the direct HTML parent of sortable items.

Outputs:
- `init: Sortable` — Initialised a new Sortablejs instance

## Public functions

- `provideGlobalSortableOptions(globalOptions: Options): Provider[]`
  Defined in `src/lib/globals.ts`

## Public type aliases

- `type CloneFunction = function`
- `type SortableData = unknown`
